pattern_en: Door-to-door 'your unit is failing' 'fire danger' urgent replacement push
pattern_ja: 訪問販売で『給湯器が故障してます』『火災の危険』と即座交換迫る
reason_en: NCAC 2024 warning: 70%+ of victims are 70+ years old. Complaint volume tripled YoY.

pattern_en: 'Sent by city office' or 'Your gas company requested us'
pattern_ja: 『自治体から委託』『契約中のガス会社から依頼』身分詐称
reason_en: Legitimate vendors do not visit unannounced via these channels. Verify directly.

pattern_ja: エコキュート460L標準で¥1,500,000超の見積
reason_en: HS standard 1.014M JPY (pre-subsidy). Over 1.5M JPY confirmed overpricing.

pattern_ja: エコジョーズ24号交換で¥500,000超
reason_en: HS standard 250K JPY. Over 500K JPY exceeds 2x markup.

pattern_en: Quote without manufacturer / model / capacity / grade
pattern_ja: メーカー・型番・容量・グレード不明の見積書
reason_en: Same-capacity Eco-Cute models differ by 400-600K JPY between entry and high grades.

pattern_en: Labor and materials lumped as single line item
pattern_ja: 工事費・材料費が『一式』計上
reason_en: Water heater installation has 10+ distinct work steps. Refusal to itemize is overpricing pattern.

pattern_en: '30% off today only' 'this price ends today' urgent close
pattern_ja: 『今日だけ30%OFF』『この価格は今だけ』即決迫り
reason_en: Fictitious campaigns. The 'regular price' is already inflated.

pattern_en: Refusing to give time for family discussion or comparison
pattern_ja: じっくり考える時間を与えず契約を急かす
reason_en: Pressure tactics to bypass cooling-off period and multi-vendor quotes.

pattern_en: Unknown manufacturers or OEM brands sold at list price
pattern_ja: 聞いたことのないメーカー or OEMブランド品を定価で販売
reason_en: Verify against major makers (Mitsubishi, Daikin, Panasonic, Corona, Hitachi).

pattern_en: No mention of 2026 subsidy program (max 240K JPY)
pattern_ja: 給湯省エネ2026事業の補助金説明なし
reason_en: Legitimate vendors are registered subsidy agents; absence indicates non-registered or fraudulent.

pattern_ja: 本体・工事の10年保証がない
reason_en: 5-year manufacturer + 5-year contractor warranty is industry standard.

pattern_ja: ガス給湯器の接続工事を無資格者が担当
reason_en: Gas Equipment Installation Supervisor license is legally required. Risk of leak/explosion.

pattern_ja: エコキュート200V工事を無資格者が兼務
reason_en: Class-2 Electrician license is legally required.

pattern_en: Unit 'breaks' during inspection - suspected deliberate damage
pattern_ja: 点検中に機器が故障する・わざと壊したと疑われる挙動
reason_en: Criminal pattern. Document with photos/video and contact police.

pattern_en: Subsidy amount mismatches official figures (e.g., 200K JPY for Eco-Cute)
pattern_ja: 補助金額が公式と違う（エコキュート20万円等の誇大表示）
reason_en: Eco-Cute base 70K JPY, max 130K + removal add-ons. Over 200K is misleading advertising.
